violations.text: The date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

Various foods were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

The window screen to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting (Holes and gaps observed.) Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025

The ice machine and prep sink is lacking an air gap (Air Break). A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Per PIC, plumber has been contacted. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025
The date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. Ice machine to be emptied end of day and wash, rinsed, and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2024

The ice machine and prep sink is lacking an air gap (Air Break). A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2024

ROP lobster was observed thawing with the package in tact. ROP seafood must be thawed removed from package or package not in tact. Food was still frozen, lobster was sliced open. PIC to instruct all staff on proper thawing methods of all ROP seafood. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/13/2023
